title: Thesis Workshop
content:
Thesis Workshop

So as you all (assumedly) know: we are in the last third of our stay here at this MFA program, and in this last third we have two semesters, and it is in our final semester that our thesis is due. This is much less time then it seems, and the final semester in some ways doesn’t truly count as a full semester allowing for a solid 5 months of work. Within the first few weeks of our final semester our individual thesis projects will be due in something of a final form for commenting from our individual committees.

What I’m proposing is that we meet twice a month over the course of the Fall semester to hold each other accountable, share useful information, give each other general written/nonwritten feedback, and just general support and companionship in our last year.

So this email is just preliminary to see who is into this idea and then I’ll go further to pick some dates.

I’ve included Dustin, Nick, Chris, Natalie, Kathleen, Jason Wilson, Kathryn, and Trina in this list—who am I missing?
